title: Use reversed view instead of reverse copy for read-only cases
description: For read-only scenarios, avoid creating a new collection and reversing it. Instead, use built-in utilities that provide a reversed view of the collection. This approach improves performance by avoiding unnecessary memory allocation and copying.
recommendation: Use built-in methods or utilities that provide a reversed view of the collection rather than copying and reversing the entire collection when no modification is required.

checks.message: Use built-in methods or utilities that provide a reversed view of the collection rather than copying and reversing the entire collection when no modification is required.
